issues.title: console.error
issues.detail: https://www.auraterminal.ai/register Loading the script 'https://translate.google.com/translate_a/element.js?cb=auraGoogleTranslateInit' violates the following Content Security Policy directive: "script-src-elem 'self' 'unsafe-inline' blob: https://vercel.live https://js.stripe.com https://www.google.com https://www.gstatic.com https://www.recaptcha.net https://apis.google.com https://s3.tradingview.com". The action has been blocked.
